Spring Data Elasticsearch
  1. org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.index

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.index

Packages that use org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.index
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.client.elc
This package contains classes that use the new Elasticsearch client library (co.elastic.clients:elasticsearch-java) to access Elasticsearch.
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core
 
org.springframework.data.elasticsearch.core.index

    A single action to be contained in AliasActions.
    AliasActionParameters

    A class to hold the mapping parameters that might be set on Field or InnerField annotation.

    Allows to customize MappingParameters that are being emitted for each supported annotation.
